frame_analyses.description: Woman in red sweater holding stack of white papers in home setting
frame_analyses.technique_notes: This appears to be a craft project tutorial, not an FLS task

frame_analyses.description: Displaying 24 sheets of white paper on counter with text overlay
Folding and joining 4 sheets together as instructed by text overlay
Drawing curved pattern on folded paper with black marker
Cutting paper with scissors following drawn pattern
Gluing multiple cut paper sections together
Final white paper fan/flower decoration displayed by woman

task_specific_assessments.notes: This video shows a paper craft tutorial for making decorative fans/flowers, not an FLS laparoscopic surgery training task. No laparoscopic instruments, trainers, or medical materials are visible.

confidence_rationale: This is clearly a paper craft tutorial, not an FLS task. No laparoscopic equipment, medical training materials, or surgical techniques are present.
technique_summary: This video demonstrates paper crafting techniques for creating decorative items, not laparoscopic surgical skills training.
improvement_suggestions: Please provide video of an actual FLS task (peg transfer, pattern cutting on gauze, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture) for assessment.
